creator: barbara.xxx1975@libero.it
text:
I had the same problem that I solved in this way:
    portupgrade -f -m 'LDFLAGS+=3D-Wl,--export-dynamic' gnomebaker

Now I've just tested your patch and it works too for me.

Thanks
